Calculation.Text:
/* Parameters : content <-- Content to display. Eg : Text textCol <-- Text colour in CSS format. Eg : #ffeedd, abcdef or rgb(255,234,123); bgCol <-- Background colour. See textCol examples. */ Let ( [ content = " "; textCol = Color Hex Value; bgCol = Color Hex Value; ltc = Length (textCol); tc = Substitute (Case (ltc = 6; "#" & textCol; ltc = 7; textCol; ltc = 0; "#000000"; textCol); " "; ""); lbc = Length (bgCol); bc = Substitute (Case (lbc = 6; "#" & bgCol; lbc = 7; bgCol; lbc = 0; "#ffffff"; bgCol); " "; "") ]; "data:text/html,¶ ¶
¶" & content & "
¶ ¶ " )
